title: Human-readable self-service CLI and operator experience
acceptance: Every user-facing message explains the outcome, practical impact, required decision, protection boundary, and next action in plain language before technical details.
Hierarchical help, compact status, next-action guidance, presets, shell completion, and deterministic import or export are available.
The local installer or updater supports check, plan, apply, destination selection, rollback guidance, and JSON output.
Golden Italian and English journeys are understandable without prior Agentic SDLC knowledge while preserving stable technical identifiers only as secondary detail.
